dynamic.title: ⚡ Dynamic settings
dynamic.shortcuts: Shortcuts: arrow keys ← → ↑ ↓ for X/Y and Q/E for Z.

text.title: 🔤 Text settings
text.startTextTitle: Restart the next drawing from the beginning of the text and place the cursor at the start.

formula.title: ∑ Formula settings
formula.help: Functions: sin, cos, tan, asin, acos, atan, sqrt, abs, log, exp, pow, sign, min, max; constants: PI, E.

privacy.title: Privacy and local data processing
privacy.body:
OptimeFlow(s) C△lyCaLigramas runs primarily locally in your browser. Your texts, strokes, settings, selected audio files, and microphone recordings are processed on your device for display and export; this app does not send that creative content to third-party servers.

  • Data that may remain stored in your browser: language, theme, panel visibility, and interface preferences via localStorage, as well as PWA assets and language dictionaries in the browser cache to enable offline loading and use.
  • Audio and microphone: microphone access is requested only if you choose to record. Audio that you load or record is handled locally for playback and clip export.
  • Exports: PNG, JSON, and video files are generated in your browser and downloaded directly to your device.
  • Connectivity: the app may request its own static files and translations from the same origin in order to load or update as a PWA. In this bundle, no trackers, analytics, or redistributed third-party JavaScript libraries have been identified.
  • User control: you can clear local data from your browser, revoke microphone permission at any time, and remove loaded or recorded audio from within the app before exporting.

Controller: Andrés Calvo Espinosa.
Last updated: {{updated}}.

coherence.title: Universal Coherence
coherence.body: May this work serve as both gratitude and commitment: to think, feel, and act in the same direction, without “ornaments”; to keep creating with ethics, joy, and respect for everything that connects us.

exportClip.title: Export 20 s clip
